title: Smart Catalog Reader
description: AI-powered PDF catalog extraction system using Google Gemini Vision for cosmetics product data

modal.subtitle: Intelligent PDF Product Extraction
modal.fullDescription: An intelligent PDF catalog extraction system utilizing Google Gemini Vision AI to automatically extract structured product data from cosmetics catalogs, particularly from brands like O Boticário and Natura. Built with Clean Architecture principles, the system features batch processing, fuzzy-matched category normalization, comprehensive validation with auto-correction, and checkpoint-based resumption for interrupted extractions.
features: Batch processing of PDF pages into images at configurable DPI
AI-powered extraction of product codes, names, pricing, and promotional details
Fuzzy-matched category normalization against master categories
Comprehensive validation with auto-correction of pricing inconsistencies
Checkpoint system enabling resumption of interrupted extractions
Exponential backoff retry logic for API rate limits
Real-time progress tracking with Rich terminal UI

title: Social Economic Survey App
description: Socio-economic data collection platform for field surveys and research in Brazilian communities

modal.subtitle: Field Survey Platform for Social Research
modal.fullDescription: A comprehensive socio-economic data collection platform designed for field surveys and research in Brazilian communities. Built with modern mobile technologies for offline-first data gathering, real-time synchronization, and actionable analytics. Supports researchers, NGOs, and government agencies in conducting household surveys, collecting demographic and economic data, and generating insights for social programs and policy-making.
features: Offline-first field data collection with photos, GPS coordinates, and audio notes
10 specialized dashboards for real-time analytics and insights
Multi-platform support (iOS, Android, Web)
Dual implementation: React Native (Expo) and Flutter
Firebase backend with Firestore, Storage, and Authentication
Brazilian context: income ranges, poverty line calculations, pt-BR language

title: Urban Sketchers Curitiba
description: Community website for Urban Sketchers Curitiba, documenting 436+ on-location drawing events

modal.subtitle: Artistic Community Platform
modal.fullDescription: Website for Urban Sketchers Curitiba, part of the global Urban Sketchers movement founded in 2007 by journalist Gabriel Campanario. Urban Sketchers is a worldwide community of artists who practice on-location drawing in cities, towns, and villages where they live or travel. This platform documents the Curitiba chapter's activities, with 436+ events already held. The site features event archives, artist galleries, and community resources, with images primarily extracted from Instagram publications.
features: Event archive documenting 436+ on-location drawing sessions
Artist community gallery and profiles
Event mapping and location history (in progress)
Integration with Instagram for image sourcing
Community resources and drawing guidelines
Event calendar and upcoming meetups

title: Real Estate Intelligence
description: 3D urban modeling platform for real estate market analysis and geospatial insights
alt: 3D urban visualization for real estate intelligence

modal.subtitle: Geospatial Real Estate Analytics
modal.fullDescription: A 3D urban modeling platform designed for real estate market intelligence. The system renders detailed city-scale building models with height, density, and land-use data to support investment decisions, market comparisons, and urban development insights.
features: 3D city visualization with building footprints and volumetric modeling
Property density and land-use classification analysis
Geospatial data integration for market intelligence
Urban infrastructure and accessibility mapping
Interactive exploration of neighborhoods and districts
Data-driven insights for investment decisions

title: Energy Bill Data Extractor
description: CLI tool for extracting structured data from Brazilian energy bills using LLM with schema validation and guardrails

modal.subtitle: Intelligent Document Processing
modal.fullDescription: Command-line interface for automated extraction of structured data from Brazilian energy bills (contas de energia). Leverages Large Language Models with strict schema validation and guardrails to parse complex utility documents into clean, structured JSON output. Handles diverse bill formats from multiple energy distributors across Brazil.
features: LLM-powered extraction with structured output schemas
Guardrails for data validation and error handling
Support for multiple Brazilian energy distributors
CLI interface for batch processing and automation
JSON output with standardized field mapping
Handles OCR artifacts and formatting variations

title: Urban Vulnerability Detection
description: Vector search application for identifying urban vulnerable areas using government data and satellite imagery

modal.subtitle: AI-Powered Urban Analysis
modal.fullDescription: Innovative vector search application for identifying urban vulnerable areas using Brazilian government data, satellite imagery, and advanced AI techniques. Combines Census 2022 data with satellite analysis to detect vulnerability patterns across thousands of areas.
features: 12,348+ vulnerable areas from Census 2022 with real shapefile polygons
Demographic sectors with population and infrastructure data
Google Earth Engine integration with Landsat 8/9 Collection 2
NDVI, NDBI, LST indices calculated for each area
Multi-spectral analysis for vulnerability pattern detection
Public dataset hosted on Google Cloud Storage

title: Organizze Telegram Bot
description: AI-powered Telegram bot for personal finance insights using Gemini
alt: Organizze Telegram Bot with AI financial insights

modal.subtitle: Natural Language Financial Assistant
modal.fullDescription: A Telegram bot that integrates with Organizze (organizze.com.br), a popular Brazilian personal finance app with 87k+ reviews. Using Google Gemini AI, it provides natural language financial insights and visualizations. Users can query their finances in conversational Portuguese and receive contextual responses with charts and dashboards. Organizze handles expense tracking, bank account management, and Open Finance integrations with major Brazilian banks.
features: Natural language interface for financial queries in Portuguese
AI-powered analysis using Google Gemini for contextual responses
Visual dashboards with pie charts, bar charts, and summaries
Pre-built commands for common queries like balance and expenses
Whitelist-based access control via Telegram Chat IDs

title: ACCEF Platform
description: Intranet/backoffice platform for a social assistance organization

modal.subtitle: Social Organization Backoffice System
modal.fullDescription: An intranet/backoffice platform built for ACCEF (Associação Centro de Convivência Espaço da Família), a social assistance organization. The system handles volunteer management, donor tracking, beneficiary registration, asset inventory, program coordination, financial management, and reporting dashboards.
features: Beneficiary registration and management with demographic tracking
Volunteer and staff coordination modules
Asset inventory and loan management
Program and workshop scheduling
Financial tracking with donation management
Analytics dashboards and reporting

title: n8n-nodes-sklearn
description: Custom n8n nodes for integrating scikit-learn ML algorithms into workflows

modal.subtitle: Machine Learning Nodes for n8n
modal.fullDescription: Custom n8n nodes for integrating scikit-learn machine learning algorithms into your n8n workflows. This package enables no-code/low-code ML pipelines by bringing scikit-learn's powerful algorithms directly into the n8n automation platform.
features: Seamless integration of scikit-learn algorithms into n8n workflows
Support for classification, regression, and clustering models
No-code/low-code machine learning pipeline creation
Easy model training and prediction within automation workflows

title: Bias Reflector
description: AI-powered cognitive bias analyzer with interactive D3.js visualization

modal.subtitle: Cognitive Bias Analysis Tool
modal.fullDescription: Bias Reflector is a sophisticated web application that analyzes conversations for cognitive biases using Google's Gemini AI and visualizes them through an interactive D3.js radial cluster diagram. The tool helps users identify and understand the 188 cognitive biases from the Cognitive Bias Codex framework in real-time conversational exchanges.
features: AI-Powered Analysis: Leverages Gemini 3 Flash to detect cognitive biases in conversational text
Interactive Visualization: D3.js radial cluster diagram with 188 cognitive biases organized hierarchically
Real-time Detection: Instant analysis of two-way conversations with confidence scoring
Educational Tool: Helps users understand bias patterns and improve critical thinking
Responsive Design: Modern, mobile-friendly interface built with React and Tailwind CSS

title: DYOD
description: `Do Your Own Diligence`: Web extension to automate brief investigation

modal.subtitle: Company Due Diligence Automation
modal.fullDescription: A proof-of-concept Chrome extension that automates brief due diligence using OpenAI API. Analyzes companies and generates structured JSON reports covering five critical risk categories: financial, legal, executive, reputational, and regulatory. The extension synthesizes a 1-5 risk score based on comprehensive analysis of corporate data, enabling quick assessment of potential business partners or investment opportunities.
features: AI-powered company analysis with structured JSON output
Five-category risk assessment: financial, legal, executive, reputational, regulatory
1-5 risk scoring system with contextual evaluation
Secure API key storage in Chrome local storage
JSON export for integration with other tools
Privacy-focused: runs fully in browser with no external data transmission
Planned: Multi-API support, real-time research, batch CSV analysis, Google Sheets integration

title: Airflow Web ETL
description: Pipeline to scrape data and load it into a Postgres db

modal.subtitle: Data Pipeline Automation
modal.fullDescription: A fully containerized data pipeline using Apache Airflow to scrape quotes from the web, transform the data, and load it into a PostgreSQL database. The entire setup can be initialized with a single shell script, demonstrating modern ETL best practices with Docker orchestration. Features web-based DAG management and monitoring through Airflow's UI.
features: Automated web scraping with BeautifulSoup
Data transformation and cleaning pipeline
PostgreSQL database loading with timestamps
Complete Docker containerization via Docker Compose
Airflow web UI for DAG management and monitoring
Single-command setup and deployment
Structured data extraction: quotes, authors, tags, timestamps

modal.subtitle: Product Information Management
modal.fullDescription: A comprehensive Product Information Management (PIM) platform designed to centralize, enrich, and distribute product data across multiple e-commerce channels. Built with a modern microservices architecture using Go for high-performance backend operations and PostgreSQL for reliable data persistence. The platform enables efficient product catalog management, multi-channel distribution, and data quality control for e-commerce operations.
features: Centralized product catalog management
Multi-channel product data distribution
Product attribute and specification management
Image and digital asset management
Data quality validation and enrichment
RESTful API for system integrations
Dockerized deployment for scalability

title: Corporate Page
description: Demonstration of home page for corporate website

modal.subtitle: Corporate Landing Page
modal.fullDescription: A contemporary web application designed as an engaging homepage with integrated authentication, featuring a full-screen video backdrop for corporate website deployment. Built with modern React development practices and optimized with Vite for rapid development cycles. The project emphasizes modularity through reusable components while creating an immersive visual experience with video backgrounds.
features: Full-screen corporate video background integration
Authentication sidebar with login interface
Component-based React architecture for modularity
Optimized build process via Vite
Responsive design for multiple screen sizes
Modern UI patterns for corporate applications

title: VTEX Integrations
description: Integration of multiple ERP systems and VTEX e-commerce APIs

modal.subtitle: Enterprise E-commerce Integration
modal.fullDescription: Enterprise-grade integration layer connecting multiple ERP systems with VTEX e-commerce platform APIs. Developed for the Brazilian agricultural commerce sector, this integration enables seamless data synchronization between legacy ERP systems and modern e-commerce infrastructure. Handles product catalogs, inventory management, order processing, and customer data across distributed systems while maintaining data consistency and real-time updates.
features: Multi-ERP system integration with VTEX platform
Real-time product catalog and inventory synchronization
Automated order processing and fulfillment
Customer data management across systems
Error handling and data validation
Scalable architecture for high-volume transactions
Production deployment for agricultural B2B commerce

title: Water Dam Monitoring
description: Data collection system for 3,000+ dams safety monitoring in Paraná, Brazil

modal.subtitle: Critical Infrastructure Monitoring
modal.fullDescription: Data collection and monitoring system developed for SIMEPAR (Sistema de Tecnologia e Monitoramento Ambiental do Paraná) as part of the state's dam safety program. The system supports the inspection and classification of over 3,000 dams across Paraná, Brazil, using remote sensing, satellite imagery, and field data collection to assess structural conditions and safety risks.
features: Remote sensing and satellite imagery analysis for dam identification
Field inspection data collection and synchronization
Risk classification system (CRI) and damage potential assessment (DPA)
Integration with state environmental monitoring infrastructure
Support for dams with water surfaces exceeding 10,000 m²

title: Backoffice CRUD
description: Application for CRUD operations on predefined e-commerce entities

modal.subtitle: E-commerce Backoffice System
modal.fullDescription: A full-stack CRUD application built in a monorepo configuration for managing e-commerce entities through REST APIs and a React interface. Implements complete Create, Read, Update, and Delete operations on predefined database tables with DDL definitions. Features JWT authentication, rate limiting for security, and comprehensive API documentation via Swagger. Demonstrates modern web application architecture with separation of concerns and security best practices.
features: Complete CRUD operations for e-commerce entities
JWT-based authentication with Bearer tokens
Rate limiting for API security
Swagger/OpenAPI documentation
React frontend with clean UI
MySQL database with predefined DDL schemas
Postman/Insomnia collection for API testing
Monorepo structure for frontend and backend

title: GEAR_SIM.v1
description: Interactive 3D involute gear simulator with React and Three.js for real-time mechanical engineering visualization

modal.subtitle: Involute Geometry & Rotation Dynamics Simulator
modal.fullDescription: GEAR_SIM.v1 is an interactive 3D gear simulator developed with React and Three.js that combines mechanical engineering and computer graphics to generate involute gear geometries in real-time. The system enables visualization of transmission ratios, angular velocities, and complex physical interactions in an immersive WebGL environment.
features: Procedural Generation: Mathematically calculates each gear vertex instead of using pre-made 3D models for technical precision
Real-Time Simulation: Optimized animation loop synchronizing React state with the 3D rendering engine
Involute Mesh Engine: Procedural 3D mesh generation based on real engineering parameters (module, tooth count, pressure angle)
High-Performance Rendering: Three.js with dynamic lighting, metallic materials, and orbital camera controls
Industrial Dashboard UI: Modern interface with glassmorphism aesthetics and real-time diagnostic feedback
Diagnostic Systems: State reset and stability mechanisms for consistent cross-browser experience

title: Three.js Fire Animation
description: Dynamic 3D simulation of fire effect using three.js voxels

modal.subtitle: 3D Fire Simulation Experiment
modal.fullDescription: A community-driven playground showcasing various implementations of the classic DOOM fire effect algorithm. This experimental project features 60+ distinct implementations demonstrating different rendering methods, cross-platform approaches, and creative variations of the iconic fire animation. The repository serves as a collaborative space for developers to experiment with and contribute different technical approaches to recreating this retro visual effect using modern web technologies.
features: 60+ implementations of DOOM fire algorithm
Multiple rendering methods: Canvas, WebGL, Three.js, PixiJS
Cross-platform implementations: web, mobile, terminal, embedded
Interactive controls: wind simulation, color customization, particle effects
Various frameworks: React, Flutter, Unity, Godot, Love2D
GPU acceleration and WebAssembly variants
Open-source contributions encouraged with MIT license
